 {"id":"bd-3uuf","title":"Unit tests: session_index core behaviors + lock/error paths","description":"# Goal
Add unit tests for src/session_index.rs covering indexing, listing, reindexing, and lock/error behavior.

# Scope / Deliverables
- index_session on in-memory session is a no-op (no path).
- index_session inserts/updates rows and meta.last_sync_epoch_ms.
- list_sessions() returns newest-first ordering; cwd filter works.
- reindex_all rebuilds index from disk and handles missing roots gracefully.
- Error paths: unreadable JSONL, sqlite open failures (simulate via read-only dir) do not panic and surface Error::session.
- Lock behavior: lock file prevents concurrent access (simulate with fs4 lock held).

# No-Mock Rule
- Use real temp dirs and actual sqlite files; no faked connections.

# Logging
- Use TestHarness/TestLogger to log paths, insert counts, and query results.

# Acceptance
- 12+ focused tests covering happy + error paths.
- Deterministic, offline, no network.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
